query:
SELECT r.id, r.userId, r.stageId, r.type, r.status, r.fileUrl, r.createdAt, u.email, s.name as stageName
FROM reports r
JOIN users u ON r.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN stages s ON r.stageId = s.id
WHERE u.email = 'test.ogrenci2@gmail.com'
ORDER BY r.createdAt DESC;
